## Description

## Steps to Reproduce

2. Run command '...'
3. See error

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- Bot version: [e.g. 1.0.0]

Paste any error messages here
